description_long: This is a vintage-style convertible car with a bright orange exterior and a white and black interior. The body is heavily dented and crumpled, suggesting it has been in a significant accident or subjected to rough use. The car features classic chrome bumpers, whitewall tires, and a prominent front grille. The convertible top is down, revealing two front seats and a steering wheel with a retro design. The rear of the car includes large tail fins and a visible license plate. The overall appearance is both stylish and distressed, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A vintage orange convertible car with a crumpled, damaged body and a white and black interior, featuring chrome details and classic styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crumpled hood, chrome bumper, and exposed white seats.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extensive dents along the body and the open convertible top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the damaged trunk, large tail fins, and visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view with more visible dents and the steering wheel in clear view.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights, chrome bezels, classic arrangement
